hero.title: Interiors That Win By Design
hero.excerpt: Orenda is a boutique interior studio crafting calm, cinematic spaces for private homes, hotels and heritage buildings — with studios in Milan and Geneva.

about.excerpt: Studios in Milan and Geneva. A team of fifteen designers, makers and stewards of slow craft.

slides.title: Experience
slides.desc: For clients who trust quiet craft, twelve years of patient interior composition across four continents.

slides.title: Ateliers
slides.desc: Half our commissions are restorations — buildings that have held a century of light, and still ask for more.

slides.title: Craft
slides.desc: Every Orenda interior passes through the hands of a single steward, from first sketch to the last piece of hardware.

about.heading: We Design Spaces, Not Just Rooms.
about.body: Founded in 2014 by Elena Conti, Orenda treats every interior as a composition — slowly sketched, quietly finished, and built to age well. We take on only eight commissions per year.

services.title: Where Vision Meets Space
services.excerpt: Three disciplines, one studio standard. Each commission is led by a single steward, from the first conversation to the last piece of hardware set in place.

work.title: Every Space Has A Story
work.excerpt: Every commission carries its own tone, but the studio language remains constant. Filter the archive to move through residences, hotels, restorations, commercial spaces and light-led commissions.

steps.title: Discover The Space
steps.text: We spend the first seven days witnessing — watching how light, rhythm and daily life move through your space. Nothing is drawn until we understand how the room is lived in.

steps.title: Compose The Narrative
steps.text: Material boards, lighting studies and spatial drawings converge into a single narrative — a quiet story the interior will tell, in every season, for decades.

steps.title: Deliver With Craft
steps.text: Our ateliers build. Stewards site-supervise. Every finish is reviewed in the room's own light. You walk in once — to stay.

mediaSlides.alt: Designer listening in a client's home
Finished interior with late afternoon light

testimonials.title: Reflections From Our Community.
testimonials.factLabel: Clients who return for a second project within three years — the quietest endorsement we know.

quotes.text: Elena and her team did not design us a house; they composed one. Three years on, the rooms still surprise us — and that, I think, is the mark of real design.
quotes.author: Isabella Conti

quotes.text: Elena and her team did not design us a house; they composed one. Three years on, the rooms still surprise us — and that, I think, is the mark of real design.

booking.title: Ready To Talk About Your Space?
booking.excerpt: Tell us about your space — we'll tell you honestly whether we're the right studio for it.
